templates.what_you_understood: You took in the visual anchor.
templates.what_is_incomplete: We haven't put it into words yet.
templates.why_this_step_matters: Images stick faster than words. The picture is your hook.
templates.what_to_do_next: Move to Define and lock the concept into language.

templates.what_is_incomplete: The definition needs a clearer subject + meaning pairing.
templates.what_layer_is_missing: Define — give a complete sentence that explains what it is.
templates.why_this_step_matters: A precise definition is the spine of every other layer.

templates.what_you_understood: You're working with the structure of the word.
templates.what_is_incomplete: The prefix, root, or suffix isn't fully separated yet.
templates.what_layer_is_missing: Break It Down — identify each word part and its meaning.
templates.why_this_step_matters: Decoding word parts makes new terms feel familiar instead of foreign.
templates.what_to_do_next: List prefix, root, and suffix on separate lines with their meanings.

templates.what_you_understood: You're rebuilding the definition from memory.
templates.what_is_incomplete: Some key words are still missing.
templates.what_layer_is_missing: Recall — locking the definition without the source visible.
templates.why_this_step_matters: Active recall is what moves a term from short-term to long-term memory.
templates.what_to_do_next: Re-read the definition once, then try the blanks again.

templates.what_you_understood: You're starting to spot the pattern.
templates.what_is_incomplete: The match wasn't quite the strongest example yet.
templates.what_layer_is_missing: Recognize — pointing to a real-world instance.
templates.why_this_step_matters: If you can find it in the wild, you own it.
templates.what_to_do_next: Try one more example and explain why it fits.

templates.what_is_incomplete: The bridge between the concept and the familiar thing is still thin.
templates.what_layer_is_missing: Metaphor — a strong "like a" or "as if" comparison.
templates.why_this_step_matters: Analogies let your brain reuse pathways you already trust.
templates.what_to_do_next: Finish the sentence: "This is like a ___ because ___."

templates.what_you_understood: You're taking in the deeper layer.
templates.what_is_incomplete: We haven't anchored the why yet.
templates.what_layer_is_missing: Information — the context that makes the concept matter.
templates.why_this_step_matters: Context is what turns facts into understanding.
templates.what_to_do_next: Read the expanded text and note the one detail that surprised you.

templates.what_is_incomplete: Your own voice and insight aren't fully showing yet.
templates.what_layer_is_missing: Reflection — what this means for you, your growth, your work.
templates.why_this_step_matters: Reflection is where information becomes identity.
templates.what_to_do_next: Write 2–3 sentences starting with "For me, this means…"

templates.what_you_understood: You're putting the concept to work.
templates.what_is_incomplete: The scenario needs a concrete action and outcome.
templates.what_layer_is_missing: Apply — showing the steps you'd take in practice.
templates.why_this_step_matters: If you can use it, you understand it.
templates.what_to_do_next: Walk through the scenario step by step: first I __, then I __.

templates.why_this_step_matters: Mastery is recall under pressure. We're not skipping past this.
templates.what_to_do_next: We'll strengthen this layer together — no advancing yet.
